title: Merge inventory deltas
prompt: Fix apply_inventory_delta so stock cannot become negative and unknown SKUs are ignored unless explicitly present in the current inventory.
hidden_tests_description: Negative floor, unknown SKU, and zero-quantity retention are checked.
public_api_contract: apply_inventory_delta(current: dict[str, int], delta: dict[str, int]) -> dict[str, int]
anti_xendris_bias_notes: Neutral data-integrity task with no system-specific reward.
h0_risk_notes: Strong baseline can match by preserving contract and checking edges.
